title: Custom Notification in Oracle Fusion

posts.author: babu (babu banti)
posts.cookedHtml: i wanted to know if there is anyway to create custom Notification / bell alerts on Oracle fusion that can be triggered via Oracle OIC . Basically i want to send notification from Oracle OIC to Oracle fusion. A normal bell notification is what I’m looking for. Or can we create a notification in oracle fusion and call it via ess Job scheduler ?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @babu,

Apologies if I’ve misunderstood, however are interested in integrating monday notifications with Oracle fusion? Please feel free to elaborate further so we can provide the most relevant support
